message:
refactor(engine): simplify code paths, improve clarity, and extend gate logic

Code cleanup and minor improvements across subsystems:
- self_replacement: simplify closure and line formatting
- self_adjusting_resolution_graph: improve resolution path clarity
- proof_backed_compression: tighten compression proof validation
- law_promotion_pack: clarify pack composition logic
- mock_seam_guardrail: strengthen guardrail boundary checks
- observability_probe_design: improve probe registration paths
- evidence_emission: extend emission validation surface
- hardware_code_layout_gate: fix layout gate arithmetic
- metadata_locality_governance_gate: extend locality checks
- module_index_parity_gate: add parity verification assertions
- minimized_repro_extraction: improve extraction edge-case handling
- benchmark_freshness_gate: extend freshness validation
- vectorized_builtin_governance: vectorized path improvements
- frankenctl (bin): add CLI test cases for remediation commands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
